title: Lion Territory
productionNotes: Heavy steppers reggae foundation with militant precision—deep 808 subs on the one-drop, crisp trap hi-hats rolling double-time over the reggae backbone. Nyabinghi drums provide ceremonial weight in the low end while digital percs add modern edge. ITAL PHOENIX's baritone sits authoritative and centered, warm but unwavering. Dub delays on vocal phrases create spatial depth, occasional horn stabs (brass section) punctuate the warrior stance. Mix should feel like standing at a fortress gate—grounded, immovable, protecting sacred ground.
intro:
Nyabinghi drums building with trap hi-hats entering
Deep dub echo swirling

Yeah yeah
Dem cyan cross di line now
Lion wake
verse1:
Mi set mi boundary inna digital space
No vampire energy touch mi face
Dem want fi drain out di light weh mi find
But mi guard it like treasure, protect mi mind
From di scrolling addiction and di fake friend dem
From di algorithm weh try bend mi stem
Mi root deep now inna solid ground
Any snake weh come slither, dem get put down
Not with violence but with conscious sight
Mi see through di darkness, mi armed with light
prechorus:
Dem test di gate, dem test di door
But mi nuh sleep like before
Mi third eye open, mi vision clear
Only di righteous permitted here
chorus:
This a lion territory
Cyan bring no Babylon story
This a lion territory
Fi di awakened, this a glory
This a lion territory
No more scrolling through di worry
This a lion territory
Protect di flame, no hurry
verse2:
Dem say mi too conscious, dem say mi too strict
But mi know di difference 'tween di real and di trick
Mi did lost inna Babylon fog too long
Now mi fortress built and mi army strong
Not fi war 'gainst people but fi war 'gainst lie
Fi protect di youth dem weh ready fi fly
Di elders teach mi how fi hold di line
How fi recognize when di devil design
When di wolf come dressed up inna sheep disguise
Mi roar truth loud and mi claims di prize
bridge:
Selassie I guidance inna every stand
Ancestral wisdom guide mi hand
Not aggression, just protection mode
Di sacred space where di conscious grow
Where di healing happen and di vision stay
Where di algorithm cyan lead astray
This a sanctuary from di digital chains
Only pure intention inna dese lanes
outro:
Nyabinghi drums fading with trap elements
Deep bass resonating

Lion territory, yeah
Walk good or nuh walk at all
Boundaries set, foundation tall
Jah know, Jah know

(Dub echoes trailing off)
promptForSuno: Steppers reggae trap fusion 82 BPM, deep Jamaican baritone male vocals authentic patois, militant spiritual warrior energy, heavy one-drop 808 bass with trap hi-hat rolls, Nyabinghi ceremonial drums layered underneath, authoritative protective stance, dub echo effects on vocals, occasional brass horn stabs, E major rootsy foundation, boundary-setting consciousness anthem, grounded immovable strength, warm baritone centered in mix, digital percussion accents over reggae backbone, fortress energy, lion roar metaphor, Rastafarian warrior protection mode
